Class ExtendedRepresenter

java.lang.Object
org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.representer.BaseRepresenter
org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.representer.StandardRepresenter
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.engine.ExtendedRepresenter
public class ExtendedRepresenter extends org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.representer.StandardRepresenter
A custom representer for the SnakeYAML Engine allowing to represent Section objects, serializing custom objects, all of which while keeping comments and without any additional time consumption.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • ExtendedRepresenter

      public ExtendedRepresenter(Class<?> documentType, @NotNull GeneralSettings generalSettings, @NotNull DumperSettings dumperSettings, @NotNull org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.api.DumpSettings engineSettings)
      Creates an instance of the representer.
      Parameters:
      documentType - the represented type of the document
      generalSettings - general settings of the root's file, whose contents are going to be represented
      dumperSettings - dumper settings
      engineSettings - engine dump settings already built by the dumper settings

    • ExtendedRepresenter

      public ExtendedRepresenter(@NotNull GeneralSettings generalSettings, @NotNull DumperSettings dumperSettings)
      Creates an instance of the representer.
      Parameters:
      generalSettings - general settings of the root's file, whose contents are going to be represented
      dumperSettings - dumper settings
      See Also:
      • ExtendedRepresenter(GeneralSettings, DumperSettings)
